headline: Does Norwegian’s Philadelphia Homeport Expansion Reshape the Bull Case For Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH)?
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line has already returned to Philadelphia after a 15-year absence, deploying Norwegian Jewel and Norwegian Pearl on Bermuda and Canada & New England routes through 2028, alongside constructing a new terminal to support embarkation and disembarkation. This move expands Norwegian’s reach in the Mid-Atlantic region and highlights how port infrastructure investments can deepen regional presence and customer access. Next, we’ll examine how the Philadelphia homeport expansion and...
